name: splynek
title: Splynek
description: Submit URLs to Splynek, see active downloads, pause/resume, check Sovereignty score — all from Raycast.
author: splynek

preferences.name: host
preferences.title: Mac host
preferences.description: Hostname or IP of the Mac running Splynek (e.g. 192.168.1.42 or my-mac.local).

preferences.name: port
preferences.title: Port
preferences.description: Splynek's HTTP port — find it in the Mac's Settings → Web dashboard QR.

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API token
preferences.description: Mint one in Splynek (Mac) → Settings → API tokens. Pro feature.

commands.name: submit-url
commands.title: Submit URL to Splynek
commands.subtitle: Splynek
commands.description: Queue a URL on the paired Mac.

commands.name: sovereignty-score
commands.title: Splynek Sovereignty Score
commands.subtitle: Splynek
commands.description: Show the Sovereignty score for your Mac's installed apps.

commands.name: pause-all
commands.title: Pause All Splynek Downloads
commands.subtitle: Splynek
commands.description: Pause every running download on the paired Mac.

commands.name: resume-all
commands.title: Resume All Splynek Downloads
commands.subtitle: Splynek
commands.description: Resume every paused download on the paired Mac.
